description: Boolean-intent callbacks are retagged from plain integer 1/0 returns to bool: true/false, matching open.mp/modern-compiler recommended style.

origin.notes: Illustrative migration pattern (int 1/0 -> bool: true/false for boolean-intent callbacks), chosen because bool: tag support is a real, documented modern Pawn compiler feature. Treat the exact callback list as illustrative, not an authoritative migration checklist, until pawn-api/pawnmigrate confirm it.

expected.notes: This migration is not implemented yet. The pair records the intended source edit.
